response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack web engineer with a strong track record across TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems, including some low-latency work and recent AI-agent tooling at Google. However, the Principal Performance Architect role requires deep expertise in SoC and IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator optimization, and deep learning workload analysis — none of which appear anywhere in this resume. His educational background (BS in CS, BA in Fine Arts) also falls short of the preferred advanced-degree profile, and there is no indication of GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or silicon-level performance work.
strengths: Demonstrated performance-oriented engineering at Dunnhumby, handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Current AI-adjacent work at Google contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing exposure to agentic AI ecosystems
Long career of polyglot, cross-platform engineering (web, mobile, embedded, robotics) indicating broad technical adaptability
concerns: Zero experience with SoC or IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or any silicon-level performance analysis
No background in deep learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator development
Educational credentials (BS CS + BA Fine Arts) do not meet the preferred advanced-degree threshold and no equivalent compensating hardware-domain expertise is present
